mapper.select: SELECT rest_idx, rest_nm, rest_addr, lat, lon, rest_facilities, rest_img FROM tb_restarea where rest_nm like CONCAT('%', #{restNm}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_review (rest_idx, mem_id, review_content, review_like, review_ratings, created_at) VALUES (#{rest_idx}, #{mem_id}, #{review_content}, 0, #{review_ratings}, NOW());
